initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  oc.customer_unique_id,
  COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count,
  AVG(op.payment_value) AS avg_payment_value,
  oc.customer_city,
  oc.customer_state
FROM 
  olist_customers oc
JOIN 
  olist_orders o ON oc.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN 
  olist_order_payments op ON o.order_id = op.order_id
WHERE 
  o.order_status = 'delivered'
GROUP BY 
  oc.customer_unique_id, oc.customer_city, oc.customer_state
ORDER BY 
  order_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    c.customer_unique_id,
    COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count,
    AVG(p.payment_value) AS avg_payment_value,
    c.customer_city,
    c.customer_state
FROM 
    olist_customers c
JOIN 
    olist_orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN 
    olist_order_payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id
WHERE 
    o.order_status = 'delivered'
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_unique_id, c.customer_city, c.customer_state
ORDER BY 
    order_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

    oc.customer_unique_id,
    COUNT oo.order_id) AS order_count,
    AVG(op.payment_value) AS avg_payment_value,

FROM

JOIN 
    olist_orders oo ON oc.customer_id = oo.customer_id
JOIN

WHERE 
    oo.order_status = 'delivered'
GROUP BY 
    oc.customer_unique_id, oc.customer_city, oc.customer_state
ORDER BY 
    order_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

    olist_orders o ON oc.customer_id = o.customer_id
JOIN

WHERE 
    o.order_status = 'delivered'
GROUP BY 
    oc.customer_unique_id, oc.customer_city, oc.customer_state

LIMIT 3;
